title: ambrosia psilostachya var. coronopifolia
intro: Ambrosia psilostachya var. coronopifolia, also known as desert ragwort, is a variety of the ragwort plant that is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ambrosia psilostachya var. coronopifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
